name: blucli
description: BluOS/Bluesound/NAD audio player control via the blu CLI. Device discovery, playback control (play/pause/stop), volume management, grouping, and TuneIn search/play. Go binary install via go install. Requires Bluesound, NAD, or other BluOS-compatible hardware.
review: BluOS audio player control skill for Bluesound/NAD hardware owners. Niche but fills a unique gap in the catalog. SKILL.md is minimal — agents should rely on blu --help to discover available flags. Requires BluOS-compatible hardware. Published with conditions: expanded command docs and binary name clarification recommended.
